endpoints.name: Lists all of the available Service Fabric resource provider API operations.
endpoints.description: Get the list of available Service Fabric resource provider API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of application type name resources created in the specified Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.description: Gets all application type name resources created or in the process of being created in the Service Fabric cluster resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.
